title: dianthus helenae
intro: Dianthus helenae, also known as the Helen's Pink Flower or Helen's Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This perennial herb has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dianthus helenae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Dianthus helenae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
